summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS OF GLOBAL ESCALATION: Brandon shares his experiences and visions concerning global events, asserting an acceleration of political unrest, wars, and natural disasters. He recounts a dream about an asteroid and a megaton bomb targeting Tel Aviv, linking these scenarios to geopolitical shifts involving China, Iran, and the United States. Brandon discusses potential attacks on Israel from surrounding nations, referencing biblical prophecies such as Ezekiel 38 and Psalm 83. He also describes visions of biological weapons, a bunker-buster missile provided by the US, and widespread destruction in Damascus, framing these elements as warnings for his audience to focus their prayers.

DOMESTIC THREATS AND ECONOMIC SHIFTS: Transitioning to concerns regarding the United States, Brandon expresses his concerns about individuals crossing the border over the past several years and warns of potential attacks on smaller American cities like Omaha and Little Rock. He describes an impending Pearl Harbor event and details subjective visions of severe economic turmoil, including 1970s-style gas shortages with prices exceeding eight dollars a gallon. Furthermore, Brandon anticipates a major wealth transfer and a new industrial revolution driven by artificial intelligence and cryptocurrency, suggesting that these developments might serve as distractions from ongoing global conflicts.

SHARED PROPHECIES AND POLITICAL STANCES: Brandon incorporates past prophetic statements from Maurice Sklar, detailing scenarios of Islamic terrorism, sudden missile attacks on Israel to overwhelm defenses, and subsequent nuclear responses. He aligns these accounts with his belief in imminent global shaking. Throughout his commentary, Brandon voices strong support for Donald Trump, praising his leadership and framing his political presence as a crucial defense against international adversaries. Conversely, he criticizes other world leaders, including Emmanuel Macron and an unnamed Canadian official, portraying them with suspicion and describing their actions as detrimental to global stability.

SPIRITUAL GUIDANCE AND PASTORAL CARE: In his role as a watchman, Brandon advises his audience to avoid relying on mainstream news for their prayer focus, encouraging them instead to seek an eagle's eye view through spiritual foresight. He recounts a pastoral intervention where he prayed for a grieving mother struggling with loss and divorce, emphasizing his belief in God's capacity to bring healing.
rawData: [June 18, 2025]-[The Lord showed me much today in prayer]-[https://youtu.be/DNbjAj9RilM]-[Hey, good morning, family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us today. Well, I have Diana with me. She's going to read a prophetic word that is in due season. I'm telling you folks, I've never seen it like this before. It's like what the Lord told us, that there would be an acceleration of things: political, war, earthquakes in diverse places. The heavens—we haven't seen that yet, all the major asteroids. I had a dream of another major thing coming with an asteroid two nights ago, and with finances. And so, we see the five shakings that He said were coming. Now we're seeing this major escalation of what I told you all in prayer, I think it was like four videos ago, three videos ago, when He said, 'Pray over a megaton bomb coming into Tel Aviv.' And I had Diana Braden Google. Iran doesn't even have one of those—this massive thing that I saw. Well, I thought, 'Well, Lord, I know I hear You, and I know what You told me to watch out for, and You told me to bring it to the people.' And so I did. Then we see Trump leave the G7 summit early, like in the middle of it, and leave and go back, and he has a major meeting tonight as we're speaking. And we see China say, 'We're going to back Iran.' And I thought, 'Well, there's where the megaton bomb comes from, if China says, "Hey, we'll give you supplies or whatever you're going to need."' If you go back to what the Lord showed me in the World War II video, I saw troops coming against Israel with red hats on. But I also saw in that what people would call the great betrayal during the Ezekiel 38 and 39 war. I told everybody, 'They will call this the great betrayal,' because I saw America standing by. Now, are we in that timeframe? No, I do not believe we're in Ezekiel 38 and 39 as of yet. I believe it's coming. I believe the hook in the jaw is coming. I believe there are escalations now. I was hearing this prophetic word that you're about to read, Diana. Maurice Sklar says he believes we're entering—we entered into Psalm 83, which, sorry to say, I'm ignorant about, but I didn't even know there was a Psalm 83 because I haven't heard anybody teach about it until I saw this prophetic word. And I was like, 'Well, hold on a minute, I haven't heard the Bible theologians talk about Psalm 83 a lot in the end times.' But I respect Maurice. I know he's a man of God, and he hears God. He has very accurate words, so it's very interesting, some of this that you're about to hear. I've talked about this in the past, but as the days go by, look, folks, words are coming to pass. And I know it's not always people's hot topic. They don't want to talk—they want to talk about the end times, the rapture, all the great, beautiful things of the revival, but we have to talk about the dark side of the coin, too. I told you, I don't just always talk about the sugar. I believe the revival is awesome, and I'm excited, but this is my main vein of warning, warning, warning. If you haven't noticed, the Lord said, 'You're called to say the hard things.' And I do it. And you know what, I want to say this: yesterday, when I apologized if I came across cranky, that was because I was corrected by the Holy Spirit. It wasn't about y'all; it was about what He said. He said, 'Brandon, come across softer toward the people. I want you to deliver it so that the ones that need to truly hear it will not click out of the video. Present it in a way that is a little bit more...' I don't even know what to say, how to say it, but I know what He's saying. So that's what I had for you yesterday. But I want to let you all know we love you, we're thankful for every single one of you, and we're so grateful that you would come and listen to us. But I'm telling you, we have a word that is in due season. I'm warning you all of a major shaking still going to happen in the Middle East with Israel, with these signs. But what I'm more concerned about is not even Israel, but about America and what has crossed the border over the last four years—past, going on four and a half years before Trump put a stop to it—what came across our border. And many people say, 'Well, Brandon, hopefully we've got these guys; they're hiding out.' And I saw funneling of hundreds of millions of dollars over the last four years for buying supplies and doing all this. We pray protection over our nation. I believe it's a time like never before that we rise up and take our dominion and authority. You know, it's like we take dominion and authority over Oklahoma; we're praying over our area. If you live in Oklahoma, you're joining in with us, but you need to do that in your hometown. One of the things that I forgot to say out of that prophetic word, when I told you I was driving around a couple of days ago, the Lord said, 'Watch small cities, unexpected locations. Like Omaha, Nebraska was one of the major cities.' He said, 'Watch Oklahoma City, watch Little Rock.' These little cities that are not too big like a New York or a Los Angeles or something like that, but there might be a couple million people in them, but it's not like, 'Oh my goodness,' you know? And the Lord told me, He said, 'Watch these places. It's Pearl Harbor events.' He said, 'Watch for that.' Remember when I told you all I heard China say, 'We must create a Pearl Harbor event,' and I saw them talking to North Korea? And North Korea was a social pariah; that's why they asked him to do it, because Kim Jong-un is not respected anywhere. I mean, he is Kim Jong-un. And I saw China becoming desperate with their finances, remember? And because they were desperate with their finances, they were like backed into a corner, and they were like the samurais that would die on their sword because it was an honor thing. And that's what the Lord said: 'You don't understand their culture versus a Western culture; they think totally different.' And the Lord told me about all this stuff, and being just an old country boy, I don't know that kind of stuff, you know? And I told Diana, I said, 'You know, the Holy Spirit's been talking to me about this.' We go over things that the Lord says because Diana's real educated. And I said, 'You know, it makes sense, doesn't it?' The way the Lord's talking to me about this, about how China thinks differently than Western culture. And I thought, you know, we see Iran now—not become what I have seen so far, but it's headed there with being set back economically, with their military, with everything. I've seen a major setback. Now, I even described the missile. This is what's so amazing, folks. I give all the glory to God, but I think it's amazing the way He comes out with the plan to tell you back in January about even the missile that I saw that Israel needed. And I saw USA on the side of this missile, and it was black and white, and it was a bunker buster. And I didn't know that Israel didn't have these missiles that were capable of going into that mountain that was a city that had nuclear stuff going on with biological weapons inside of this mountain. Whenever I was watching the news, and they showed the mountain range and where it was, and they said, 'This is where they have to hit, but they don't have the equipment without the United States' help,' I went, 'Oh my, Braden, we were...' and I go, 'Diana, did you—oh, rewind, rewind!' And I said, 'Look, they're talking about the missile that I saw.' And I told you all it's black and white and it looks like an arrowhead, and I said, 'This is the missile that they have to get from America, that they will get from America, to go inside that mountain.' But I saw 50-gallon drums coming out of that mountain to go to Damascus to try to gas the Israelis in the days ahead, and I saw trucks full of this biological weapon. And the Lord said, 'You must pray on behalf of this, because they will try to use biological weapons in the days ahead on Israel.' And it was like a mustard-looking, yellow-looking gas when they were spraying it on the people. They tried to do like crop dusters and stuff. It was like—I don't know, you know, like they were trying to get them with the spray. And I saw the people; it was a gas, and they got boils all over their skin, and it was melting their skin, and they were just dying instantly. It was awful. It was a very, very traumatic death. But when they did this, I saw Damascus with a suitcase-looking bomb thing, and it was thin. I remember looking in the spirit and the Lord showing me this. And it's even on videos, I've told you all. I have archives of prayer things that I've done with y'all, of everything I've shared. I'm very transparent, and you know, it's amazing because the Lord said, 'Damascus and Assyria will become a ruinous heap' in the Word. Well, I believe we're about to see that. I believe we could be days, weeks, whatever away from seeing Damascus become what the Bible said it would become. Then I saw Turkey, furious that this happened, and trying to come against Israel. It became a really nasty mess. Well, where was America during this timeframe? I remember I told you, I want you to think about—go back, because Braden and I put these together. Braden does all my archives, and he does all the videos, he's over them, he studies them. So, thank God for him, but he does that. Dina does the emails and all the other side of it, and Braden does archiving. And I thought it was interesting when I saw China going after Taiwan in the days ahead. And America—I said, 'Where is America at to defend Taiwan in this?' But they were preoccupied with something else. And I saw gray upon the soil. I saw gray; it looked like ash. It looked like something bad from Louisiana to Canada, all upon the eastern seaboard. And I said, 'What is this thick gray all over there?' And I still can't figure out what all that gray stuff is, this soot-looking stuff. It looked like thick, gooey something all over the soil, and I know it represents something. But if you go back, even with the last vision that I had with the dragon coming up three times out of the sea from Cuba—and the Lord keeps telling us, 'Watch Cuba, watch Cuba. They're being promised things.' And they showed up in Russia; they went and had the meetings there, and they even talked about it, that they sent delegates or whatever to Russia. So we see these things being talked about. So I'm trying to just paint a picture for you of all the visions that I've had, saying, 'Look.' And so here we have Cuba. He keeps saying in these paradigms, 'Watch Cuba.' And I'm like, 'Well, watch Cuba? What are we watching Cuba for?' But I saw biological things. I saw these things, I saw the dragon coming up out of the water. And it was the kind of dragon what you see in the parades. Well, China has the parades that look like those papier-mâché dragons that they're dancing, and the people are in them and they're dancing. That's the kind of dragon it was. It was like the ones that move their mouth, and it's really decorative, and they do the dances with them for their parades and stuff, their Chinese celebrations. So this is what I saw, and that was coming up and out of the water. But it was purple, a light lavender purple with a dark fin on its back, with dark purple around his eyes with white on that dark purple, and then a really bright eye that looked green. Then I saw that the feet, the claws, were dark purple as it came up out of the water, with a dark purple tail. And I think that's very interesting. I've never seen a purple dragon because usually they're red and stuff in China. So, after I saw that, then I saw China moving in and striking Taiwan. That's what it was all about after all that. So, trying to piece things together, I'm not adding to or taking away from anything. I just put the pieces together and say, 'Look, this one could fit there, and look how that all kind of goes together.' Because I believe it's the Lord talking to us to tell us to pray about these things, because He said, 'Pray for Taiwan that this does not happen,' and that megaton bomb coming over Tel Aviv and hitting Israel. But when I saw the people dancing in the streets in the days ahead, they said, 'Our deliverer has come.' The Lord said, 'I'm going to show up and show off in a way that this generation has never seen before for the Israeli people. I'm going to come through for them.' And so I just want you to be encouraged with everything I'm saying, but I believe we're about to see some radical stuff. So we pray for the enemy within America, the Red Dawn experience in the ten cities. We need to pray over that. And some of these things are going to take place, some of it's going to happen because we're in the end times and a great escalation of things will take place. Remember I said it even in the short video, 'Everything's going to change.' The Lord said it again, 'Everything you know will change within 24 hours. Life as you know it, and how you live right now, Brandon, will change within 24 hours.' A great acceleration of things is about to take place. 'The wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous.' We're going to see that. I saw oil in the Mediterranean, I saw oil in the Gulf of Mexico, I saw oil trying to come up to back the dollar, and trying to do all this stuff as Iran is crippled in the days ahead. Now, will we see that? I pray we don't. Gas lines are going to be terrible. I saw 1970s gas shortages, miles long, where people in California couldn't get gas. And people said, 'Well, we don't buy our gas from Iran.' And I understand that, but it was about the world stage. It wasn't about America. It was about the price of the petrodollar shooting up because of a supply shortage in Iran from other nations. So I know China gets oil from there and other nations, right? So it's not just about America. It never is just about America; it's about the world. So, let's see. I pray that, like I said, I pray that doesn't happen. I pray we don't see five and six dollars a gallon, ten dollars. What was it, Braden? I saw gallons of gas go over eight dollars a gallon average. Yeah, an eight-dollar-a-gallon average is what the vision I had, and I wrote it all down. And it lasted for several months, and people were upset about it, you know, because everything went back up. So do I say every vision I have comes to pass perfectly? No. You know why? Because we have people that pray. I believe with all my heart the visions the Lord gives me are not all just prophetic, 'Thus saith the Lord,' like somebody who is a Kim Clement or whatever giving words that are prophetic. I am a watchman, and a lot of the words I give, the Lord tells me, 'You should pray. You pray.' Well, what does that tell you? Pray and change it. You're an intercessor—that's what I do, and I've done this for years. But I see these things, I see in part, hear in part. But the things I see, I believe a lot of it we can change. I believe a lot of it we can change through prayer; some of it we cannot. So it's only by intercessory prayer. So if we don't see it to pass, and you say, 'Well, that part of it didn't happen, but the war did and the escalation of it.' So, Tehran is being evacuated right now as we speak, and I think, what is that going to do? What is all this, seventeen million people all leaving at the same time? That's crazy. Can you imagine the traffic in that? When we went to Florida, and there's like how many million people in Florida, that traffic was terrible going around Miami. I was like, 'I can't imagine living here every day.' Those people were nuts, the way they drove, compared to Oklahoma. We're just backwoods people. They were just like flowing inside... I was just like, 'Oh my God.' You know, driving down the freeway, I go, "I've got to get off and get on a side road." That's why I said, "I can't do this." They're aggressive drivers. We're more like taking in the scenery and going real slow. Hey look, we rubberneck a lot looking at the wrecks or whatever. You've got to go. These people are like—I was like, "It's scary, isn't it?" I just can't see how they—I bet the insurance down there is nuts to have a car, you know, for your teenager. It would be like, "Yeah, it's $1,000 a month for insurance." I'm like, "Yeah, no, we're good." So, okay, well, let's read this prophetic word, like I said, and then we're going to pray. So this video is going to be longer today. For the people who say, "Hey, I don't want to be here," fast forward it, or what is that thing called? Double speed it. Oh, we got a microphone from somebody, so we're hoping it works better because—sorry, my voice is—I don't realize. I feel like I'm talking loud in my head. I feel like I'm talking loud, but I guess it's not carrying across. Sorry. Well, they always say, "We can't hear. We can't hear anything." We have a lot of elderly on here, and I try to make sure that they are able to hear. I try to talk as loud as I can. I feel like I'm yelling. I feel like I'm really yelling whenever I'm talking that loud. It was August 20th of 2014 that he gave this prophetic word. Yes, okay, so that tells you how many years God gives in a warning. Do you see that, folks? God's a God of mercy. He gives us—hey, August 20th of 2014, almost exactly over 11 years ago, almost. Maurice Sklar. Okay, this is Maurice Sklar. Okay, go ahead. Okay, the Lord spoke to me again today and he said to warn America again: "These Islamic terrorists will only stop when they are killed. They have been brainwashed from infancy to do what they are doing. This will force the hand of Israel and even the USA into war." In my opinion, the Psalm 83 Obadiah war is on our doorstep now and cannot be held back much longer. The war will change our world; make no mistake about it. These present Middle East conflicts will escalate rapidly if not held back by God's mercy, and we will soon be in a full-scale war. Soon, Israel will attack Iran to destroy their nuclear capabilities. Iran will also strike back. This will also hit us in America, not just the Middle East. Did you hear that? Yes. There will be terrorism here in America as well, with both murder and destruction of property. The house of Esau, Edom, will be destroyed by God, as it is written in the prophet Obadiah and many other prophets in the scriptures. Damascus will be destroyed very soon, according to Isaiah 17. Obadiah wrote, "As they have spoken against Israel, so shall it be done to them," but this will involve much collateral damage, both in Israel and America. We will be shaken to the core in the West, both economically and spiritually. God must allow this to awaken the church and bring about national repentance in both America and Israel. Oh, prayer warriors, pray for protection of Israel, especially Tel Aviv. I saw an attempted chemical attack there in a vision today. Pray also for protection in America's major cities. Now, God is separating cities and places of refuge where he will supernaturally protect and provide for his people. Make sure that you are exactly where God wants you, dear saints of God. Riots igniting racism will begin in other places than just Missouri when food and water become harder to get. Beloved, wake up, Yeshua is coming for his bride very soon. Okay, well, here's part two of this. Okay, this was, I believe, 2019, a couple of years later from that one. He said, "I had a night vision dream last night. I was observing a meeting of military leaders with the Supreme Leader of the Iranian regime. They were seated at a very large conference table that was curved like an oval shape on the sides and square at each end. On the far end was the headman, who had a white beard and was wearing a white head wrap and a long dark brown robe. Flanking him on both sides were men dressed in military uniforms. They were speaking in their language, but somehow I understood the conversation. In a nutshell, the leader said that Iran is in a crisis that is both from without and within. Within, he said, it was the rise of Christian revival in Iran. From without, it is economic. 'The great Satan,' as he called the United States, 'has nearly crippled our economy and is threatening our future.' Then he said Allah had spoken to him to gather those in that room and tell them the time has now come to go to war, to end all wars, and destroy the little Satan and to mortally wound the great Satan. At first, I didn't understand what he meant, and then I realized this is referring to Israel and the US. Everyone at the table then applauded and shouted together in unison, "Our God is greater! Death to our eternal enemies!" The leader then continued and said, "The Mahdi Messiah is about to appear, and we are to prepare his way. Even if Iran falls, we must destroy the Zionist regime. All is now prepared. We have the weapon to overwhelm them and wipe the little Satan out and liberate the Middle East." Then they all stood, except the leader, and shouted over and over, "Our God is greater! Death to the infidels!" Then the Holy Spirit said to me, "Iran's fanatical regime has plans now in place for a sudden, all-out attack on Israel. They plan to use the element of surprise to launch a simultaneous missile attack from all sides against Israel. They believe it will overwhelm the IDF missile defenses by the sheer number of missiles from all sides. They have nuclear capability now, though it is limited and has not been tested. Their military strategy is to knock out the missile defenses first, and then try to sneak in the atomic warheads in the deluge. They have now ten nuclear devices which are hidden among their arsenal, including one submarine. Tell my prayer warriors to take authority and intercede now that this evil plot will be stopped." Then the dream ended. So, is there more, honey? No, that's it. So, I want you to—after you hear those kinds of warnings from different intercessory prayer people like us, it didn't happen directly how, you know, Israel struck them, but we see them doing what he's talking about. And I knew in my spirit, the Lord showed me there's much more. He even talked about the biological weapons, folks, that they had them deep within this mountain. Here's another part of it we're going to read. Okay, our battery died on our laptop. We had to start over. There is coming an all-out war in the Middle East as the neighboring Arab nations—oh, wait, sorry, before I start, this was in 2011. There is coming an all-out war in the Middle East as the neighboring Arab nations will come against Israel with a sudden missile attack, starting from the north with Hezbollah, Lebanon, and Syria. Other Arab nations will join. Israel will be hit from all sides at once, and there will be deaths and partial destruction of settlements, smaller cities to the north, and some damage to Tel Aviv and Jerusalem as well. Israel will respond with great force, and limited nuclear weapons will release devastation upon the neighboring countries, particularly Lebanon, Damascus (which will be destroyed completely), and the rest of Syria, as well as military strikes into Iran, Gaza, and even northern Egypt's Sinai region. So, I just want to say this: look at the dates of when the Lord gave those and how much time he gives us. And now, I believe we're right at the door. It seems like with the visions the Lord has been giving us, they seem like they happen within a couple of weeks to months from each other. I mean, it hasn't been like—well, because I used to think, I used to see things, and it would take years and years, and you'd be like, "It's the birthing pains." I told Dina, "I had the vision. You see that come to pass a long time ago." And, you know, now we're just now seeing it, and it's been 15 years ago or whatever, you know? And it's amazing to see now, we pray something in November or December, and we're seeing it six months later to seven months later. And I believe it's going to keep escalating just like that. And so now, some of them we're seeing in January, and we're seeing them in June, you know? And so I don't know, I just think it's interesting. I believe the time is short; that's why. So all that being said, I want to pray today and see if the Lord has anything he wants to show us, because I think it's important. You know, yesterday he wanted me praying for the lady that lost her child in that car accident. It was a tragic accident. I saw a child pass away and the mother was—it caused a divorce in that family. You know, the Lord shows that because he cares. I got an email today from somebody saying, "Thank you for praying for them, because she believed it was her." Wow, praise the Lord. Well, that's hard, but I'm glad it touched somebody. Somebody who's been through something, I saw it was a very hard situation. A very tragic death for the child, and the marriage fell apart. And the Lord wanted to really help that lady. She was really battling suicide. There were really dark things, contemplating things running through her mind, being alone, feeling guilty, feeling all these things, and remorse. The enemy will always play the greatest hits: "What ifs?" That's his biggest M.O. He wants you to always play back those greatest hits: "What if? What if? What if?" And I believe that's one of his greatest weapons to get you to get down on yourself, get down on life, and wish you could change things. We can't change our past, it's done. But what the devil meant for bad, God is going to turn around for good. And we always need to pray that we're in the right place at the right time, and listening to that still, small voice. You might say, "Well, Brandon, I didn't hear anything and a tragic accident happened." In the days ahead, if you're in the wrong place at the wrong time and you go home early, to be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. Regardless of what happens, we don't blame God. This is why I told Dina, even with the stuff we've been through, "You always stay on God's side." The enemy wants you immediately to be like Job's wife, who said, "Curse God and die, Job. Look at all the stuff that's going on. Surely, God is mad at you." You know, he's like, "Though he slay me, yet will I praise him regardless of what I'm going through." Delilah is what I want to call her. I'm not going to curse my God. I'm going to tell him, "Yet though he slay me, I will praise him." And I believe in all the circumstances that we see coming, you know, even when he's talking about food shortages—I've talked about food shortages, I talked about all the economic shakings that are coming, all the things. But we see the rain right now in Oklahoma, the area that I told you all that I believe a major revival is coming, and it's the rain in the natural and the supernatural rain right behind it. I believe we're about to see one of the greatest rains. We broke records this year. Never in the history of Oklahoma and in Dallas-Fort Worth, I believe, have we all been without drought at this time of year. Nobody's in drought around here. We've had such a surplus of rain that the people are complaining on the news, and I'm like, "Shut up, it's a blessing! Just let it fill up. There's something behind it; it's prophetic. The Lord's trying to say, 'Guess what, folks? I'm getting ready to pour out my spirit upon you like you've never seen before, and you've never seen the rain on this earth like you're seeing right now. And guess what? It's a type and shadow for what I'm about to do in these last days. You've never seen in the history of Oklahoma what I'm about to do.'" And we've seen some amazing revivals here, and I believe it's a type and shadow in the spirit realm of God saying, "Guess what? Rain like you've never seen it in the natural, and rain like you've never seen it in the supernatural. Get ready, get ready, get ready. Get your raincoat on." I always tell Diana, "Let's go tubing today." We never go tubing in a river—I think rivers are dangerous—but I'm just saying it's a good way to go down the river with Jesus. We're going down the river of life. I've got a river of life flowing out of me, come on, yeah! Or, "It's beginning to rain, it's beginning to rain. Rain, rain, hear the voice of my Father." He looks like he's getting ready to go home. We pray for his family and for him, that he gets ready to transition over. Isn't that exciting? He's 90 years old. I said, "What an exciting time." The Lord told me a lot of the elders are going to start going home. He said that he was in the hospital right now, in critical condition. So we pray for peace, and we pray, Father, if it's your will, Father, we thank you, Lord, that he's healed. But, Father, sometimes it's just time for us to go on home at 90. Yeah, I just saw it on somebody... or somebody emailed it to me, or I saw it online. I saw that you showed me, and then we love to listen to his music. "It's beginning to rain, rain. Oh, I love that song. Hear the voice of my Father." One of my favorites. He's saying, "Whoever will come, drink from my waters. He's promised to pour his spirit out on your sons and your daughters. If you're thirsty and dry, look up to the sky, it's beginning to rain." That's so anointed, I love that song. "If you're thirsty and dry, look up to the sky, it's beginning to rain." I love that song. He wrote that. "It's beginning to rain. Hear the voice of my Father, he's saying, 'Whosoever will come, drink from my waters. He's promised to pour his spirit out on your sons and your daughters. If you're thirsty and dry, look up to the sky, it's beginning to rain.'" I love that. Holy Spirit is really strong, I can feel that, hallelujah! "It's beginning to rain, hear the voice of my Father, he's saying, 'Whoever will come, drink from my waters. He's promised to pour his spirit out on your sons and your daughters. If you're thirsty and dry, look up to the sky, it's beginning to rain.
